Security:  - CEI pattern in sendCrossChainMessage  - Zero-address guards  - emergencyWithdraw for untrapping funds  - Standard Groth16 verification (4-pairing check)  - Pinned to 0.8.28 for stability Groth16 verification uses stored verification key (VK) with the equation:   e(-A, B) \u00b7 e(\u03b1, \u03b2) \u00b7 e(L, \u03b3) \u00b7 e(C, \u03b4) = 1 where L = IC[0] + publicInput * IC[1]","kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"InterlinkGateway","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/InterlinkGateway.sol":"IERC20"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/InterlinkGateway.sol":{"keccak256":"0xa3b0fa0c284182479915946a84d83bff149dbefff136af32ad0b3cbe2397ecb0","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://d7ce0759abf325d62cdd4637307b3c37e0c5e3c628d7bd69a9fa6af857fb6e6d","dweb:/ipfs/QmUHi2hQEFRApP48hWvV2f6dkUCZXKF2tuTVwEv1zFGSVL"]}},"version":1}
